person.name: Dr. David Raj M
person.title: Assistant Professor
person.department: Department of Mathematics, School of Advanced Sciences
person.affiliation: Vellore Institute of Technology, Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India
person.address: SD 6/6, TNPHC, Melakotaiyur, Chennai 600127, Tamil Nadu, India

about: Data scientist and mathematician bridging rigorous linear algebra, graph theory, and fuzzy modelling with machine learning for healthcare and engineering applications. Experienced in publication, faculty development programmes, and student-centred teaching with modern LMS tools.

researchAreas.title: Linear algebra and generalized inverses
researchAreas.desc: Matrix theory, Moore–Penrose inverses, and computational linear algebra.

researchAreas.title: Graph theory and network science
researchAreas.desc: Centrality, embeddings, and structure in complex networks.

researchAreas.title: Fuzzy logic and decision making
researchAreas.desc: Uncertainty modelling and multi-criteria decision support.

researchAreas.title: Machine learning and deep learning
researchAreas.desc: Supervised learning, GNNs, transformers, and generative AI.

researchAreas.title: Image processing and computer vision
researchAreas.desc: Segmentation, feature extraction, and industrial vision pipelines.

researchAreas.title: Scientific computing and algorithms
researchAreas.desc: High-performance numerics, optimisation, and reproducible workflows.

skills.label: Research and quantitative methods
skills.detail: Rigorous modelling, statistics, and algorithm design for applied mathematics.

skills.label: Machine learning and AI
skills.detail: From classical ML to deep learning, vision, and generative AI systems.

skills.label: Programming and scientific computing
skills.detail: Languages and libraries for reproducible research and production pipelines.

skills.label: Data systems and software development
skills.detail: Full-stack tooling, databases, version control, and workflow automation.

skills.label: Academic and professional tools
skills.detail: Publishing, assessment, accreditation, and teaching platforms.

education.degree: M.Tech. Computer Science and Engineering (AI and ML)

education.institution: Manipal Academy of Higher Education, Manipal
education.detail: Thesis: Generalized Inverses and its Applications

appointments.detail: Teaching, research supervision, and interdisciplinary collaboration in AI/ML and applied mathematics.

appointments.detail: Rainfall distribution modelling (machine learning and statistics).

appointments.org: Department of Data Science (formerly Statistics), MAHE, Manipal
appointments.detail: Generalized inverses, iterative algorithms, SageMath/Python implementations.

keyPublications.title: Low-light image enhancement using fuzzy methods
keyPublications.summary: Novel parametrized intuitionistic fuzzy framework for low-light enhancement with bounded parameter search and HSI-space modelling.

keyPublications.title: Optimal graph embedding and wirelength calculation
keyPublications.summary: Algorithms for minimum linear arrangement and embedding of graph products into grids and related host topologies.

keyPublications.title: COVID-19 vaccine decision system
keyPublications.summary: Energy-based bipolar intuitionistic fuzzy digraph model for multi-criteria vaccine selection in healthcare settings.

keyPublications.title: Intuitionistic fuzzy transportation problem solver
keyPublications.summary: Branch-and-bound technique for fully intuitionistic fuzzy transportation problems with improved computational efficiency.
keyPublications.venue: Journal of Intelligent and Fuzzy Systems, 2023

keyPublications.title: ICU mortality prediction using deep learning
keyPublications.summary: Semi-supervised clustering of MICU cohorts (MIMIC-II) with deep survival models for mortality risk stratification.

teaching.text: Applied Multivariate Data Analysis; Python for Data Science; Linear Algebra; Complex Analysis; Calculus (VIT Chennai).
Engineering Mathematics II–IV; Discrete Mathematics; Numerical Methods; Computational Lab (SMIT).

supervision: Supervising doctoral and postgraduate scholars in graph embedding, centrality measures, fuzzy modelling, and image processing; guiding undergraduate project teams in machine learning and data science.

achievements.subtitle: Ranking, accreditation and quality assurance
achievements.scope: Assistant Director, Ranking and Accreditation · VIT Chennai (2025–present)
bullets: Lead cross-departmental data collection, validation, and submission for national and international rankings (NIRF, QS, Shanghai, and allied frameworks).
Support faculty target-setting; analyse attainment against institutional goals and deliver improvement feedback.
Conduct faculty workshops on outcome-based education—CO formulation, PO mapping, and attainment analysis.
Monthly target review automation: unified departmental dashboards and growth-vs-target presentations; reduced manual compilation from ~2 days to ~2 hours.
Quality Review Report automation: weekly activity compilation for valedictory release; reduced preparation from ~1 day to ~1 hour.
NBA data quality validator: programmatic checks on 500+ faculty profiles before submission.
CO compliance tracker: defaulter lists for pending course-outcome calculations by subject, generated in minutes.

achievements.subtitle: Academic process automation
bullets: Full-stack timetable scheduler for slot-based timetabling (regular and flexi slots).
Project review management system with automated consolidated reports.
Result analytics for internal examinations: CO attainment and slow-learner identification.
Workflow utilities including automated extraction of slot-wise marks from consolidated mark files.

achievements.subtitle: Industry consultancy
bullets: Software to measure nano-tooth outlines from images, overlay digital dimensions, and produce layout-ready models (preprocessing, edge detection, deep learning, web interface).

achievements.subtitle: Training and professional development
bullets: Regular delivery in Python, R, web stacks, automation, LaTeX/Typst, data structures, ML/DL, generative AI, and LLMs.
Feb 2026 — FDP, Dayananda Sagar University: deep learning, generative AI, and transformer models.
Feb 2026 — MSc Data Science (VIT Chennai): agentic AI and autonomous intelligent systems.
Mar 2026 — Faculty training (VIT Chennai): data structures and deep learning.
